data.title: EQT AB Targets EUR 23 Billion for New Fund EQT XI
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

EQT AB ( (SE:EQT) ) has issued an announcement.

EQT AB has announced a target fund size of EUR 23 billion for its new fund, EQT XI, which aligns with the investment strategy of its predecessor, EQT X. This move is part of EQT’s strategic cycle of capital raising, ensuring investment continuity as the predecessor fund nears full investment. The announcement reflects EQT’s ongoing commitment to maintaining its position in the investment industry and providing strategic capital injections, with implications for stakeholders regarding future investment opportunities and management fee structures.

The most recent analyst rating on (SE:EQT) stock is a Hold with a SEK249.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on EQT AB stock, see the SE:EQT Stock Forecast page.

More about EQT AB

EQT is a global investment organization with a focus on active ownership strategies, rooted in Nordic heritage and a global perspective. The company manages and advises funds across various business phases, with EUR 273 billion in total assets under management as of March 2025, operating in two segments: Private Capital and Real Assets. EQT is committed to future-proofing companies and generating attractive returns, with a presence in over 25 countries and more than 1,900 employees.

Average Trading Volume: 1,303,079

Current Market Cap: SEK324B

For a thorough assessment of EQT stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Stoneweg European REIT Transitions to Stapled Trust Structure
data.description:
Stoneweg European Real Estate Investment Trust ( (SG:CWBU) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

Stoneweg European Real Estate Investment Trust, managed by Stoneweg EREIT Management Pte. Ltd., is undergoing a significant structural change. The company announced the listing of its Stapled Securities on the SGX-ST, replacing the Stoneweg European REIT Units, which will be delisted. This move is part of the proposed conversion into a stapled trust, comprising a REIT and a business trust, allowing for seamless trading under the new Stoneweg Europe Stapled Trust counters.

The most recent analyst rating on (SG:CWBU) stock is a Buy with a EUR1.90 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Stoneweg European Real Estate Investment Trust stock, see the SG:CWBU Stock Forecast page.

data.title: British American Tobacco’s Financial Stability at Risk: The Perils of Counterparty Dependence
data.description:
British American Tobacco (BTI) has disclosed a new risk, in the Debt & Financing category.

Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

British American Tobacco faces significant business risk due to its reliance on financial counterparties for managing transactions and financial risks. Should any of these counterparties fail, the company may be unable to recover payments from hedging or insurance contracts, leading to potential financial losses. Additionally, the failure of a transactional banking party could result in the loss of cash balances and disrupt payment systems, adversely affecting the company’s operations and its ability to pay creditors and suppliers. Such disruptions could negatively impact the company’s financial condition and risk profile.

Overall, Wall Street has a Moderate Sell consensus rating on BTI stock based on 1 Sell.

To learn more about British American Tobacco’s risk factors, click here.

The latest announcement is out from E-Globe S.P.A. ( (IT:EGB) ).

E-Globe S.p.A. has announced the availability of documentation for its upcoming ordinary shareholders’ meeting scheduled for June 30, 2025. More about E-Globe S.P.A.

E-Globe S.p.A. is an innovative SME operating since 2009 in the thermohydraulic and air conditioning systems industry. The company focuses on the resale and marketing of air conditioning, boilers, biomass products, and renewable energy solutions, emphasizing green economy products. It operates through physical and online channels, serving both B2C and B2B markets, with a strong presence in Italy and Central Europe.

data.title: EEMS Italia Postpones Shareholders’ Meeting for Financial Statement Adjustments
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

EEMS Italia S.p.A. ( (IT:EEMS) ) has shared an update.

EEMS Italia S.p.A. has announced the postponement of its Shareholders’ Meeting, originally scheduled for June 27, 2025, to an unspecified future date. This delay is due to the need for further accounting checks and adjustments on the consolidated financial statements as of December 31, 2024, requiring re-approval by the Board of Directors. The company has not provided a new schedule for financial events but will update the market once the financial statements are re-approved.

More about EEMS Italia S.p.A.

EEMS Italia S.p.A. is an Italian company that operates in the energy and telecommunications services sector. It is listed on the Euronext Milan market, focusing on providing essential services in these industries.

The latest announcement is out from Prospector Metals ( (TSE:PPP) ).

Prospector Metals Corp. has announced the issuance of 2,800,000 incentive stock options to its directors, officers, and consultants, pending acceptance by the TSX Venture Exchange. This move aligns with the company’s strategy to incentivize its leadership and partners, potentially impacting its operational focus and stakeholder engagement in the exploration of promising mineral districts.

Prospector Metals Corp. is a member of Discovery Group, specializing in early-stage exploration of gold and base metal prospects. Prospector emphasizes building relationships with local and Indigenous rightsholders to develop mutually beneficial partnerships.

data.title: Fidelity Minerals Announces Share Consolidation to Boost Marketability
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

Fidelity Minerals Corp ( (TSE:FMN) ) has provided an update.

Fidelity Minerals Corp. announced a proposed consolidation of its common shares, aiming to enhance marketability and facilitate additional financings. The consolidation will reduce the number of shares from approximately 108.7 million to 21.7 million, pending necessary approvals. This move is expected to improve investment appeal and support future operations, reflecting the company’s strategic efforts to strengthen its financial position and attract potential investors.

More about Fidelity Minerals Corp

Fidelity Minerals Corp. is a mining company focused on assembling a portfolio of high-quality mining assets in Peru and Canada. The company aims to delineate major deposits that could attract mid-tier and major mining companies, with projects like Las Huaquillas in Northern Peru and the Sunsets Project in British Columbia. Additionally, Fidelity holds a 25% interest in the Florina Greensands project, targeting the potassium fertilizer market.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell
